document_summary: Recommendation letter from Dr. Bin Li (William Li), founder, Chairman and CEO of NIO Inc. Li praises Liu's marketing expertise, his ISMAS model for consumer response to advertisements, and his impact on dozens of Fortune 500 companies including NIO, MG, VW, Volvo, Toyota, and others. Li credits Liu's guidance for NIO's marketing transformation that led to revenue growth from 7.825B to 36.136B CNY (2019-2021).

snippets.text: I am Bin Li. I graduated from Peking University. I am the founder of BitAuto and the founder, Chairman and CEO of NIO. During university, I founded Beijing Nanji Technology Development Co., Ltd., becoming a pioneer hosting service provider in China. Thereafter, I founded Beijing Kewen Shuye Technology Development Co., Ltd., Beijing Creative & Interactive Digital Technology Company Limited and BitAuto Holdings Limited. BitAuto Holdings Limited went listed and public on New York Stock Exchange in 2010 (stock code: BITA). In 2014, I founded NIO. In 2017, the first mass- produced model ES8 was launched. In 2018, NIO successfully went public on Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited under my leadership (stock code: 09866).
snippets.subject: Bin Li
snippets.reasoning: Establishes recommender Bin Li's credentials as founder/CEO of NIO (publicly traded EV company), validating his authority to recommend Liu.

snippets.text: Professor Dehuan Liu chaired many sociological research projects at early as the beginning of the 1990s. I participated in part of the researches and investigations, including many market research projects and some social investigation projects, e.g., "Investigation on Chinese Entrepreneurs", "Study on the Status of Chinese Workers", "Study on the Living Conditions of Migrant Workers", etc. In the research, Professor Dehuan Liu used various methods for in- depth analysis of the market. I benefited a lot from his professionalism.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Li describes Liu's sociological research projects from the 1990s and the market research methods that benefited Li's own career.

snippets.text: Professor Dehuan Liu proposed an ISMAS model for the exposure of consumers in the new era to marketing information (advertisements) which has been applied by Beijing Creative & Interactive Digital Technology Company Limited, Ogilvy & Mather, Dentsu, GroupM and many other advertising or media companies and has become the most popular model for consumers' response to advertisements.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Liu's ISMAS model adopted by major global advertising firms (Ogilvy, Dentsu, GroupM), becoming the most popular consumer response model.

snippets.text: After the forum was closed, we had an in- depth communication, which facilitated the marketing transformation of NIO and helped NIO to clearly identify its target markets and accurately develop its market strategies for its subsequent market development. NIO's operating revenue rose from RMB7.825 billion in 2019 to RMB16.258 billion in 2020 and even to RMB36.136 billion in 2021.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Liu's marketing guidance directly contributed to NIO's revenue growth from 7.825B to 36.136B CNY (362% increase, 2019-2021).

snippets.text: The marketing theories, theories and practices put forward by Professor Dehuan Liu are applicable not only to the automobile industry, but also to other major industries, generating a profound influence on numerous contemporary Chinese enterprises. In nearly 30 years of marketing practice, dozens of successful enterprises, including many of the Top 500 enterprises in China, have benefitted from his advices and guidance, e.g. major internet companies, mobile phone manufacturers, China Merchants Bank, Bank of China, Guizhou Gas Group, Haier, Yili Group, Sanyun Dairy, Vanke, Poly, Mixue Bingcheng, and international brands, e.g. Bayer, Astrazeneca, Procter & Gamble, etc.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Li attests that dozens of Top 500 Chinese enterprises and international brands (P&G, Bayer, AstraZeneca) have benefited from Liu's marketing guidance over 30 years.

snippets.text: Professor Dehuan Liu is one of the best experts of sociological market research in China and also one of the cutting- edge scholars in digital marketing. I am willing to act as a referrer for Professor Dehuan Liu.
snippets.subject: Dehuan Liu
snippets.reasoning: Li's concluding endorsement characterizing Liu as one of the best experts in sociological market research in China.

entities.name: Bin Li
entities.identity: Founder, Chairman and CEO of NIO Inc.; Peking University alumnus

entities.name: NIO
